$schema_note: Machine-readable feature list. state ∈ {not_started, active, blocked, passing}. A feature is 'passing' only when its 'verification' command currently succeeds; record proof in 'evidence'. Derived from project_description.md (no project_spec.docx present).

features.behavior: Project scaffold runs offline: CLI entrypoint loads and `make check` (lint+typecheck+test+e2e) passes with no business logic.
features.evidence: M0 initial commit on main; `make check` green @ 2026-06-18 (smoke + e2e pass)

features.behavior: Single point-in-time data gate: for every t, get_observation(ticker, t) returns no data timestamped after t (no look-ahead).
features.evidence: S13 done @ 2026-06-19: tests/test_no_lookahead.py sweeps every fixture session t (41 sessions, 2024-04-09..06-05) asserting no field dated > t (AAPL news, macro news, obs.t); xfail removed; macro-never-filtered check added. make check green (16 unit + e2e). M1 acceptance met.

features.behavior: Data download + Parquet cache for AAPL news, macro news (by topic), price, and SPY; offline mode reads fixtures.
features.evidence: S11 implemented (loaders + AV/yahoo adapters + read_or_fetch); tests/test_loaders.py + make check green @ 2026-06-18. LIVE download done @ 2026-06-19 (~2 min, AV Premium): AAPL_news 10,904 rows + macro_news 10,214 (2022-01..2026-06-18) + AAPL/SPY prices 1,119 each → data/*.parquet (~7 MB, gitignored).

features.behavior: NewsAgent reads AAPL news and returns a valid NewsSignal (idiosyncratic channel).
features.evidence: S22 @ 2026-06-19: NewsAgent (LCEL prompt | MockLLM.with_structured_output(NewsSignal)) returns valid NewsSignal on a fixture day; no-news day short-circuits to flat/no-edge. `pytest -k news` 2 passed; make check green.

features.behavior: MacroAgent reads macro-by-topic news + SPY trend and returns a valid MacroSignal (systematic channel; never relevance-filtered).
features.evidence: S22 @ 2026-06-19: MacroAgent returns valid MacroSignal (regime/macro_risk/drivers) from render_macro() (never relevance-filtered) + spy_trend; schema has no per-asset signal field (channel hygiene). `pytest -k macro` 1 passed; make check green.

features.behavior: TechnicalAgent interprets precomputed indicators and returns a valid TechnicalSignal (no number fabrication).
features.evidence: S22 @ 2026-06-19: TechnicalAgent interprets obs.render_indicators() (numbers computed in the data layer, never by the LLM) → valid TechnicalSignal. `pytest -k technical` 1 passed; make check green.

features.behavior: MemoryAgent retrieves top-k closed FAISS episodes and returns a valid MemoryContext.
features.evidence: S31 @ 2026-06-19: MemoryAgent wraps MemoryStore.retrieve + LCEL lesson summary → MemoryContext; cold start returns empty analogs + 'no precedent' (no hallucination); with closed episodes returns a summarized lesson. `pytest -k memory` 2 passed; make check green.

features.behavior: DebateAgent fuses the four signals + PortfolioState into a state-aware ResearchStance (hold/open/close/flip with Bull+Bear cases).
features.evidence: S23 @ 2026-06-19: DebateAgent (LCEL prompt | MockLLM.with_structured_output(ResearchStance)) fuses the 4 signals + PortfolioState → valid state-aware ResearchStance; continuity-bias 'prefers hold when held thesis valid' check passes; sample() returns K actions. `pytest -k debate` 3 passed; conviction Layers 1-2 in src/eval/calibration.py (tests/test_calibration.py 5 passed). make check green (37 unit + e2e). Layer-3 calibration (F15) deferred to Step 5.

features.behavior: PositionManager applies asymmetric hysteresis (tau_enter/exit/flip) + risk veto and returns a TradeDecision.
features.evidence: S32 @ 2026-06-19: deterministic rule engine (no LLM) — veto-first (vol/dd/macro risk_off/macro_risk/disagreement) then asymmetric hysteresis on calibrated conviction (tau_enter/exit/flip). Full current_position×signal transition table + veto-overrides-strong-signal covered. `pytest tests/test_position_manager.py` 16 passed; make check green (59 unit + e2e).

features.behavior: LangGraph orchestration runs one day end-to-end and carries PortfolioState (position + thesis) across days.
features.evidence: S33 @ 2026-06-19: build_graph compiles observe -> [news,macro,technical,memory] (parallel) -> debate -> conviction(z) -> position_manager -> commit; run_one_day yields a valid TradeDecision, carries PortfolioState across days, writes per-day trace JSON to log_dir, and drives stage(t)->flush_due(t) point-in-time. Ablation flags bypass nodes over the same graph. `pytest tests/test_graph.py` 5 passed; check-lookahead audit clean; make check green (64 unit + e2e). M3 acceptance met.

features.behavior: Delayed point-in-time memory: an episode for day t is written to FAISS only at t+1+h and retrieval returns only closed episodes.
features.evidence: S31 @ 2026-06-19: MemoryStore stage(t)/flush_due(t+1+h)/retrieve(closed-only) over a real FAISS IndexFlatIP; test_memory.py asserts an episode is retrievable ONLY at t+1+h (not t..t+h), cold start empty, and drift-demeaned reward (long>short, drift-match≈0). `pytest tests/test_memory.py` 4 passed; check-lookahead audit clean (add only in flush after window-close); make check green.

features.behavior: Walk-forward backtest over 2025-2026 with transaction fees on every position change produces an equity curve + metrics (Sharpe, MaxDD, turnover, avg holding period), PnL net of fees, execution at t+1.
features.evidence: S41+S42 @ 2026-06-19: Backtester walk-forward — capped-notional dollar accounting, t+1 execution, fee on change (flip=double); src/backtest/metrics.py computes total_return/sharpe/sortino/max_drawdown(/C0)/hit_rate/turnover/avg_holding_period on the fixed $1M base net of fees + the buy&hold trio, and writes results/{equity_curve.csv,trace.json,decisions_log.csv,metrics.json,equity_curve.png}. `--mode backtest --offline` runs 45 sessions, exits 0. tests/test_backtest.py (6) + tests/test_metrics.py (12) passed; make check green (82 unit + e2e). M4 complete.

features.behavior: Baselines computed and compared: buy & hold, single-agent (News only), and pure AV-sentiment.
features.evidence: S52 @ 2026-06-25 (ADR-021): src/eval/baselines.py — buy&hold (always long), av_sentiment (sign of per-day AV ticker_sentiment_score = baseline-to-beat, NOT the signal), single_agent (NewsAgent signal only, cached LLM); all three pushed through the SAME Backtester._run_accounting dollar loop ($1M base, t+1, fee-on-change) + compute_metrics, curves to results/curves/baseline_*.csv, + corr(LLM_sentiment, AV_score) diagnostic. tests/test_eval.py 5 passed (each baseline: full metric set + curve starts at C0; 3 curves + corr written). make check green (99 unit + e2e); check-lookahead clean (decisions <= t via get_observation, exec t+1, test window only). Metric rows fold into the S5.3 ablation_table.

features.behavior: Ablations runnable via config variants: stateless-classifier, no-memory, no-macro, no-debate, no-hysteresis.
features.evidence: S53 @ 2026-06-25 (ADR-022): src/eval/ablation.py — ABLATION_VARIANTS (full/stateless/no_memory/no_macro/no_debate/no_hysteresis) each a dataclasses.replace config toggle over the SAME graph + Backtester.run(write=False) loop; run_ablations stacks the 6 variant rows + the 3 S5.2 baselines into results/ablation_table.{csv,md} + per-variant curves. use_hysteresis wired into PositionManager (collapse tau_exit:=tau_enter; resolves ADR-010/011 deferral); stateless already in run_one_day. tests/test_eval.py -k ablation 3 passed (+ make_variant_config/_write_table/no-hysteresis unit tests) over a short window for speed. make check green (105 unit + e2e); check-lookahead clean (variants reuse the t+1 loop, test window only). NOTE: the S5.3 stretch experiments (risk_off persistence/size-down, min_holding, short-expectancy) are deferred — they don't block F14.

features.behavior: Conviction calibrated to empirical P(correct) (isotonic/Platt) on 2022-2024 with a reliability diagram.
features.evidence: S51 @ 2026-06-23 (ADR-019): src/eval/calibration.py Layer 3 — Calibrator (isotonic primary, Platt fallback <calibration_min_isotonic), fit_calibrator, reliability_diagram (Brier+ECE), _hit_label (== memory reward >0), WarmupPair/collect_warmup_pairs/run_warmup_calibration; --mode warmup wires it; conviction_node applies the frozen z->P(correct) when present (raw z offline/before warmup). tests/test_calibration.py 11 passed (isotonic monotonicity; mis-scaled z bent toward diagonal w/ Brier+ECE improving; hit-label sign; identity fallback; reliability PNG). make check green (89 unit + e2e); check-lookahead clean (forward prices used only for the frozen training label). NOTE: warm-up FAISS disk persistence deferred (ADR-019).

features.behavior: Model-sensitivity: re-run with a swapped LLM backbone (config.provider/model_id) with no other code change.
Ticker-dynamic: setting config.ticker (e.g. AMZN) re-runs the whole pipeline with no other line changed; no hardcoded 'AAPL'.
features.evidence: config-level guard passing @ 2026-06-18; full-pipeline acceptance pending M4

features.behavior: Interactive explainable web report: one self-contained results/report.html — a clickable cumulative-PnL chart (strategy vs buy & hold) where clicking a day shows that day's news read, per-agent signal + rationale (News/Macro/Technical/Memory), the bull/bear/thesis debate, the conviction, and the final decision + reason.
features.evidence: S61 @ 2026-06-26 (ADR-026): src/eval/report.py — build_report_html reads results/equity_curve.csv + results/trace.json ONLY (never recomputes), builds a Plotly (CDN) cumulative-PnL figure with clickable daily points, embeds the trace JSON inline + a plotly_click->side-panel handler, writes one self-contained results/report.html (no server, no fetch, stdlib + pandas only, no new requirements entry). Acceptance command writes results/report.html (built from the headline tau05online run: equity_curve_tau05online.csv + trace_tau05online.json, 1.5MB, opens off disk). tests/test_report.py 4 passed (self-contained HTML; trace embedded inline + clickable; 2 cum_pnl traces JSON-serializable; trace re-keyed by ISO date); ruff + mypy clean on the new files; full suite 112 passed. NOTE: repo-wide `make check` is red ONLY on a pre-existing unrelated lint line (config.py:56, >120 chars) owned by the user, not on any S61 code.
